name: American Battery Technology Company
description: American Battery Technology Company is an industry-leading battery materials company commercializing its technologies for the recycling of lithium-ion batteries, the extraction of battery-grade metals from primary resources, and the manufacturing of critical battery materials. By providing domestically sourced, low-environmental-impact critical minerals, the company is working to meet the soaring demand for electric vehicles and stationary grid storage applications while building a closed-loop circular economy for battery materials.
